title: Explore career ideas
content:
## Explore career ideas , Torotoro whakaaro aramahi

## Browse by category Tirotiro mā te kāwai ,

### Arts, media and design Ngā toi, rawatoi me te hoahoa ,
Arts, media and design includes creating and performing works of art and designing, writing, marketing and communicating information.
- Film, broadcasting and publishing
Film, broadcasting and publishing
- Marketing and communications
Marketing and communications
- Visual and performing arts
Visual and performing arts

### Business and information technology Hangarau pakihi me te mōhiohio ,
Business and information technology includes managing organisations, developing and supporting computer hardware and software, and providing financial and customer services.
- Accounting and finance
Accounting and finance
- Administration and customer services
Administration and customer services
- Hiring, training and leadership
Hiring, training and leadership
- Information technology
Information technology
- Insurance and property
Insurance and property
- Marketing and communications
Marketing and communications
- Maths, data and statistics
Maths, data and statistics

### Community and education Hapori me te mātauranga ,
Community and education includes providing library, museum and gallery services, teaching people skills and knowledge, and supporting people and communities.
- Cleaning, recycling and disposal
Cleaning, recycling and disposal
- Social work and counselling
Social work and counselling
- Sports, exercise and recreation
Sports, exercise and recreation

### Construction and infrastructure Hangahanga me te tūāhanga ,
Construction and infrastructure includes constructing buildings, roads, bridges, dams and the structures and networks that connect them.
- Architecture and construction management
Architecture and construction management
- Carpentry, roofing and masonry
Carpentry, roofing and masonry
- Painting, flooring and installation
Painting, flooring and installation
- Plumbing, gas and drainage
Plumbing, gas and drainage

### Engineering, technology and maintenance Pūhanga, hangarau me te tautiaki ,
Engineering, technology and maintenance includes building and maintaining the structures, electronics and mechanics of machines, checking materials and products, and producing energy.
- Electronics and machinery
Electronics and machinery
- Energy and chemicals
Energy and chemicals
- Information technology
Information technology
- Quality control and maintenance
Quality control and maintenance
- Vehicle building and repair
Vehicle building and repair

### Factories and manufacturing Ngā wheketere me te whakanao ,
Factories and manufacturing includes making products, processing materials, and planning the production of goods.
- Assembly, packing and processing
Assembly, packing and processing
- Clothing, footwear and fabrics
Clothing, footwear and fabrics
- Production and buying
Production and buying
- Vehicle building and repair
Vehicle building and repair

### Farming, fishing, forestry and mining Mahi pāmu, hī ika, ahurākau me te mahi maina ,
Farming, fishing, forestry and mining includes growing and producing food and resources, extracting and processing minerals, and monitoring and protecting the environment.
- Animal health and care
Animal health and care
- Environment and sustainability
Environment and sustainability
- Growing, gardening and forestry
Growing, gardening and forestry
- Quarrying and mining
Quarrying and mining

### Government, law and safety Kāwanatanga, ture me te haumaru ,
Government, law and safety includes responding to emergencies, protecting people, property and borders, enforcing laws, and analysing public activities and policies.
- Emergency, police and defence
Emergency, police and defence
Health includes improving the wellbeing of people and animals, finding and treating physical and mental health issues, and researching illnesses.
- Animal health and care
Animal health and care
- Health administration
Health administration
- Medical and surgical
Medical and surgical
- Medical assistance, science and technology
Medical assistance, science and technology
- Mental health and psychology
Mental health and psychology
- Nursing, midwifery and personal care
Nursing, midwifery and personal care
- Specialist health and therapy
Specialist health and therapy
- Vision, speech and hearing
Vision, speech and hearing

### Sales, hospitality and tourism Ngā hokonga, manaakitanga me te tāpoi ,
Sales, hospitality and tourism includes selling goods, food and drink, providing places for people to stay, and entertainment and travel services.
- Tourism, travel and entertainment
Tourism, travel and entertainment
Science includes studying processes of the natural world, testing and developing theories and using data to provide insights.
- Biology and chemistry
Biology and chemistry
- Earth science and physics
Earth science and physics
- Environment and sustainability
Environment and sustainability
- Maths, data and statistics
Maths, data and statistics

### Transport and supply Tūnuku me te whakarato ,
Transport and supply includes transporting passengers, moving and storing cargo and freight supplies, and coordinating the delivery of goods and mail.
- Air and sea transport
Air and sea transport
- Production and buying
Production and buying
- Road and rail transport
Road and rail transport
- Shipping, delivery and warehousing
Shipping, delivery and warehousing
- Vehicle building and repair
Vehicle building and repair

## Guides , Ngā aratohu
- Guide How to look for a job Me pēhea te rapu mahi Looking for a job can be scary and hard. Breaking it down into small steps will make it easier to find a job that’s right for you.

### How to look for a job

### Me pēhea te rapu mahi
Looking for a job can be scary and hard. Breaking it down into small steps will make it easier to find a job that’s right for you.
- Guide How to write a CV Me pēhea te tuhi i tētahi tāhuhu tangata Your CV is the first impression you'll make on employers, which is why it’s so important. Use these tips, examples and templates to create a CV that will get you noticed.

### Me pēhea te tuhi i tētahi tāhuhu tangata
Your CV is the first impression you'll make on employers, which is why it’s so important. Use these tips, examples and templates to create a CV that will get you noticed.
- Guide Kaupapa Māori career ideas Ngā whakaaro aramahi kaupapa Māori Tahatū Career Navigator features a number of kaupapa Māori career ideas in the mahi section. Find out more about these special jobs.

### Kaupapa Māori career ideas

### Ngā whakaaro aramahi kaupapa Māori
Tahatū Career Navigator features a number of kaupapa Māori career ideas in the mahi section. Find out more about these special jobs.
